graphDeltaNodes.intentClaim: Show a separate read-only field labeled test in the SMART-51 Factory Printer screen using the value read from GetConfig index 000.
anchors: user confirmation: name test / label test / GetConfig index 000 / no Set / no save-load

graphDeltaNodes.intentClaim: The test field is a read-only display control placed under the SMART-51 Factory Track/JIS code area without moving existing controls.
The SMART-51 GetConfig flow clears the test field at start and sets it when P51ITEM_XSTARTPOS, index 000, is read.
The test field is intentionally not a normal m_Items parameter entry, so it is excluded from SetConfig, save/load, and report loops.
anchors: SubDlg51SMART.cpp: no P51ITEM_ADDING_INIT2 registration for test

graphDeltaNodes.intentClaim: CardPrinterConfig Release_Factory Win32 build passed after the source change.

maintenanceRiskIfGraphMissing: A future maintainer or AI could mistake the tested field for a normal configurable parameter and accidentally add Set/save/load/report behavior. This graph delta records that the field was a read-only projection of index 000 only, and that the external code was later reverted.
